case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. KENYA DIXON et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT - LEASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DIXON, KENYA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1522 SUNNYDALE AVE. S.F. CA. 94134, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT DIXON, KENYA
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $5.03 FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY AS TO DEFENDANT DIXON, KENYA DOES 1-10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT DIXON, KENYA

PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS, COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM AND ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY SERVED JAN-22-2007, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT DIXON, KENYA
ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT DIXON, KENYA
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
